news.title: The memory shortage shaking Apple and Microsoft is 'existential crisis' for smaller players
news.summary: Smaller consumer electronics companies are in dire straits. Apple and Microsoft raise prices on key devices to help cover the soaring costs of memory.

news.title: U.S. strikes Iran after Trump accuses Tehran of ceasefire violation in Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: The attack comes as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-period of no hostilities as they hold talks to end their war.

news.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
news.summary: SpaceX is one of the first companies to be added to Nasdaq's fast-track inclusion framework. Nasdaq recently adopted a fast track inclusion framework for its stock market.

news.title: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel sworn in as U.S. citizen at baseball game
news.summary: The Iowa Cubs hosted an annual naturalization ceremony Thursday night in Des Moines. Abel was born in the Canadian city of Edmonton in 1962. About two dozen people from 16 countries participated in the ceremony.

news.title: SpaceX stock has cooled. Hiring for jobs in the space economy hasn't
news.summary: The SpaceX IPO euphoria is over, but the bullish trend in space economy jobs remains in place within a labor market where many other sectors have slowed hiring.

news.title: ‘She is retired’: Do I dip into my 401(k) to pay my mother’s $30,000 credit-card debt?
news.summary: “I want her to live on her Social Security instead of using it to pay off her credit-card debt,” she says.

news.title: I’m a CPA and tell my clients to claim Social Security early. Am I giving them bad advice?
news.summary: Only 8% to 10% of people wait until age 70 to claim. “Only 8-10% of the people I know wait to claim until they are 70,” he says.

news.title: AI turbocharged the stock market. Now it’s firing up the economy.
news.summary: A modern-day gold rush is giving a big boost to U.S. GDP. A gold rush in the United States is causing a boost to GDP.

news.title: Going back to the office may actually be better for you than working from home
news.summary: Returning to the office might be what fully remote workers actually need. Back to work may be what some remote workers need to get back on their feet.

news.title: Big Tech is obsessed with smart glasses. Now it has to convince people to wear them.
news.summary: Smart glasses could become the definitive hardware design of the AI era. If consumers buy in to the idea, smart glasses could be the future.
